hero.desc: Describe your trip in natural language. First the AI builds the route — roads, cities and destination. Then you complete it: stops, fuel, accommodation and campsites.
hero.appAlt: GT Overlander app home screen showing user greeting, hero with Jeep on road and Start a new route button

comoFunciona.subtitulo: From idea to ready route, in 4 steps.
comoFunciona.passo1desc: Tell it the destination, the regions you want to cross, your road preferences — in natural language
comoFunciona.passo2desc: Roads, cities and destination — ready in seconds, exactly the way you asked
comoFunciona.passo3desc: Fuel, accommodation, campsites, attractions — choose from the world's largest overlander waypoint database
comoFunciona.passo4desc: Export the route to Google Maps and drive directly on your dashboard with CarPlay or Android Auto

recursos.label: Available now
recursos.r1desc: Route built by AI in a conversation — roads, cities and destination, ready in seconds.
recursos.r2desc: Over 4 million points across 209 countries, validated and submitted by the community. The world's largest overlander database.
recursos.r3desc: Breakdown on the road? Signal in the app and nearby helpers appear. Community taking care of community.
recursos.r4desc: Social network inside GT. Follow overlanders, discover tested routes, copy complete itineraries with 1 tap.
recursos.r5desc: Your journey becomes XP, levels, achievements and regional ranking. Every km, every validation, every completed route counts.
recursos.r6desc: Overlander marketplace between real travelers. Buy, sell and trade gear with no commission on sales.

numeros.label: Momentum
numeros.rodape: App on iOS, Android and Web — compatible with CarPlay and Android Auto, in 3 languages.
numeros.s3ctx: waypoints in our database — help us grow even more
numeros.s4ctx: of those who tried came back to use it

porqueGt.titulo: Conventional map apps don't understand overland travel
porqueGt.p1: Map apps push you toward the fastest route — the main road, the shortcut, the most efficient path. For an overlander, what matters is the journey, not the destination.
porqueGt.p2: GT exists to fill that gap. An AI that understands overland travel, a proprietary database with over 4 million waypoints curated by our team and community, and an app built for those who need reliable information when the signal drops.
porqueGt.p3: We don't replace Google Maps for navigation. We become the intelligence behind support points — where to sleep, where to fuel up, where to eat, where to camp — alongside the route that makes sense for your way of traveling.
porqueGt.p4: When you finalize your itinerary, your trip moves from GT to Google Maps with a single tap. You get radar, live traffic and drive with CarPlay or Android Auto — rare among overlander apps.

empresas.label: Business Account — coming soon
empresas.titulo: Want to be seen by travelers who've already decided to go?
empresas.desc: Fuel stations, campsites, lodges, workshops and restaurants gain visibility with travelers who've already decided to pass through your region.

ctaFinal.titulo: Your next trip starts with a conversation
ctaFinal.subtitulo: Start free. No credit card, no commitment.
